raw_transcript: Doctor, it’s like passing shards of glass. Every time I go, I’m in agony for hours afterward. And there’s always bright red blood on the toilet paper. I’m honestly scared to go to the bathroom.
final_corrected_note: Doctor, it’s like passing shards of glass. Every time I go, I’m in agony for hours afterward. And there’s always bright red blood on the toilet paper. I’m honestly scared to go to the bathroom.
